items.title: Interactive metric calculators
items.description: Calculate any metric right on its page. Each metric detail page has a calculator that starts with a worked example, recalculates as you change the inputs, and shows your own segment's targets next to the result once you have taken the assessment.

items.title: Re-assessment reminder
items.description: Download a calendar invite to re-take the assessment and keep the improvement loop moving. The CS Maturity Report includes a reminder modal where you pick the interval (30, 60, or 90 days, with 90 recommended) and add a day-before heads-up alert. The Transform page offers a quick 90-day reminder.

items.title: Checklist revamp with export
items.description: A rebuilt execution checklist, with export as the headline feature. Save your checklist as a Markdown or plain-text file and bring it into the tools you already use. Export the full list or only the sections you choose, whether or not you have taken the assessment.

items.title: Resume an in-progress assessment
items.description: Pick up where you left off instead of starting the questionnaire over.

items.title: Gap-to-next-stage view
items.description: A visual map of the capability gaps between your current stage and the next, and the playbooks that close them.

items.title: Anonymous CS score submission
items.description: Optionally share your maturity score, industry, and company type to contribute to aggregate industry benchmark data.

items.title: Site-wide search
items.description: Find any metric, playbook, principle, or glossary term from a single search box.

items.title: CS Metrics Map
items.description: Show metric priority across all maturity stages in one view.
